name: Bougainville (Papua New Guinea)

colors.symbolism: the sawtooth border of the disc
the sawtooth border and the ornament

description: A dark blue field bearing in the centre a black disc with a green-and-white sawtooth border, charged with a red-and-white upe (a traditional head-dress ornament).
history: Flag of the Autonomous Region of Bougainville, an island region of Papua New Guinea. The central emblem is a traditional kapkap-style ornament with an upe head-dress.

features.role: a green-and-white sawtooth border around the disc
